things.name: Limassol Castle and Medieval Museum
things.description: Medieval Byzantine castle where Richard the Lionheart married Berengaria in 1191; today houses an excellent medieval museum with armour and artefacts

things.name: Old Port and Marina
things.description: Limassol's atmospheric old harbour with fishing boats, traditional cafes and the new luxury marina; starting point for coastal boat trips

things.name: Limassol Municipal Gardens and Zoo
things.description: Attractive public gardens with a small zoo, an open-air theatre hosting the annual Limassol Festival and a shaded promenade along the seafront

things.name: Kolossi Castle
things.description: Beautifully preserved 15th-century Crusader castle, headquarters of the Knights of St. John; surrounded by vineyards producing Commandaria wine

things.name: Kourion Archaeological Site
things.description: Spectacular clifftop Greco-Roman city with a restored 2nd-century amphitheatre still used for concerts, stunning mosaics and sea views over the bay

things.name: Limassol Seafront Promenade
things.description: 11km coastal walkway stretching from the old port to the tourist beaches, perfect for cycling and walking with cafes, playgrounds and sea views

things.name: Cyprus Wine Museum
things.description: Museum in Erimi village tracing 5,500 years of Cypriot wine history including the world's oldest named wine Commandaria and traditional wine-making methods

things.name: Akrotiri Salt Lake
things.description: Important wetland and flamingo habitat on the Akrotiri Peninsula; thousands of pink flamingos winter here from October making a spectacular sight

things.name: Old Town Market (Agora)
things.description: Restored Victorian-era covered market and surrounding lanes full of local cheeses, halloumi, olives and Cypriot delicacies in the heart of the old town

things.name: Limassol Football Stadiums
things.description: Limassol hosts both Pafos FC (UEFA Conference League 2024-25) and Aris Limassol (UEFA Europa League 2023-24) with modern stadiums in the city
